info.name: EduConnect Microservices – Complete API
info.description:
Complete EduConnect Microservices API collection.

─── QUICK START ───
1. Run any 'Login as ...' request first – the JWT token is auto-saved to {{authToken}}.
2. All other requests use {{authToken}} automatically.

─── SEEDED USERS (ready to use) ───
• admin@educonnect.com        / Admin@123      → ADMIN
• teacher@educonnect.com      / Teacher@123    → TEACHER
• student@educonnect.com      / Student@123    → STUDENT
• pm@educonnect.com           / Pm@1234        → PROGRAM_MANAGER
• compliance@educonnect.com   / Compliance@123 → COMPLIANCE_OFFICER
• auditor@educonnect.com      / Auditor@123    → GOVERNMENT_AUDITOR

─── SEEDED DATA IDs ───
Users: 1=Admin, 2=Teacher, 3=Student, 4=PM, 5=Compliance, 6=Auditor
Students: studentId=1 (userId=3)
Courses: courseId=1 (Java), courseId=2 (SpringBoot), courseId=3 (DB Design)
Assessments: assessmentId=1 (Java Quiz ACTIVE), assessmentId=2 (OOP Assignment DRAFT)
Contents: contentId=1 (Video), contentId=2 (PDF)
Enrollments: enrollmentId=1 (student→Java), enrollmentId=2 (student→SpringBoot)
Notifications: notificationId=1, notificationId=2
Compliance: complianceId=1, Audits: auditId=1
AuditLogs: auditLogId=1, auditLogId=2
Reports: reportId=1

─── GATEWAY URL ───
All requests go through API Gateway at port 8081

item.name: 🔐 Auth Service | port 8082
item.description: Authentication, registration and admin user management.

item.name: 📌 Login – All User Roles
item.description: Login with any seeded user. Token auto-saved to {{authToken}}.

request.description: userId=1 | Grants access to all /admin/** endpoints
userId=2 | Can create/update courses and grade assessments
userId=3 | Can enroll, submit assessments, track progress
userId=4 | Can view reports and manage programs
userId=5 | Can create/view compliance records and audits
userId=6 | Read-only access to compliance and reports
Public endpoint. Registers a STUDENT account and auto-creates a student profile via Feign.
Should return 400 – email is @NotBlank and @Email
Should return 500 / EmailAlreadyExistsException – email already seeded
Returns all users. Requires ADMIN role.
Returns Admin user details.
Returns Student user details.

request.description: Should return 404 – ResourceNotFoundException
Sets student user status=INACTIVE. Requires ADMIN.
Sets student user status=ACTIVE. Requires ADMIN.
Creates a TEACHER user. Requires ADMIN.
Creates a PROGRAM_MANAGER user. Requires ADMIN.
Creates a COMPLIANCE_OFFICER user. Requires ADMIN.
Creates a GOVERNMENT_AUDITOR user. Requires ADMIN.
Lists all users with TEACHER role. Requires ADMIN.
Returns all student profiles. Accessible by ADMIN, TEACHER, PROGRAM_MANAGER, STUDENT.
Returns seeded Student One profile. studentId=1.
Looks up student profile by their auth userId=3.

request.description: Should return 404 – ResourceNotFoundException
Updates student profile for userId=3. Requires STUDENT or ADMIN role.

Called by auth-service via OpenFeign after registration. Also callable directly.
